# Generated by exon. Do not edit manually.

cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.30)

set(CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD 23)
set(CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD_REQUIRED ON)
set(CMAKE_EXPERIMENTAL_CXX_IMPORT_STD "451f2fe2-a8a2-47c3-bc32-94786d8fc91b")
set(CMAKE_CXX_MODULE_STD ON)
project(txn LANGUAGES CXX)

if(MSVC)
    add_compile_options(/W4 /wd4996 /utf-8)
    add_compile_definitions(_CRT_SECURE_NO_WARNINGS)
endif()

include(FetchContent)
FetchContent_Declare(cppx
    GIT_REPOSITORY https://github.com/misut/cppx.git
    GIT_TAG v0.4.0
    GIT_SHALLOW ON
)
FetchContent_MakeAvailable(cppx)

add_library(txn-modules)
target_sources(txn-modules
    PUBLIC FILE_SET CXX_MODULES BASE_DIRS ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR} FILES
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/src/txn.cppm
)
target_link_libraries(txn-modules PUBLIC
    cppx
)

add_library(txn ALIAS txn-modules)

set_source_files_properties(
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/src/txn.cppm
    PROPERTIES COMPILE_DEFINITIONS
    "EXON_PKG_NAME=\"txn\";EXON_PKG_VERSION=\"0.5.1\""
)

if(CMAKE_SYSTEM_NAME STREQUAL "Linux")

    target_compile_options(txn-modules PRIVATE
        -fsanitize=address,undefined
        -fno-omit-frame-pointer
    )

    target_link_options(txn-modules PRIVATE
        -fsanitize=address,undefined
    )
endif()

if(CMAKE_SYSTEM_NAME STREQUAL "Darwin")

    target_compile_options(txn-modules PRIVATE
        -fsanitize=address,undefined
        -fno-omit-frame-pointer
    )

    target_link_options(txn-modules PRIVATE
        -fsanitize=address,undefined
    )
endif()

if(WIN32)

    target_compile_options(txn-modules PRIVATE
        /fsanitize=address
    )
endif()

add_executable(test-txn)
target_sources(test-txn PRIVATE
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/tests/txn.cpp
)
target_link_libraries(test-txn PRIVATE
    txn-modules
)

if(CMAKE_SYSTEM_NAME STREQUAL "Linux")

    target_compile_options(test-txn PRIVATE
        -fsanitize=address,undefined
        -fno-omit-frame-pointer
    )

    target_link_options(test-txn PRIVATE
        -fsanitize=address,undefined
    )
endif()

if(CMAKE_SYSTEM_NAME STREQUAL "Darwin")

    target_compile_options(test-txn PRIVATE
        -fsanitize=address,undefined
        -fno-omit-frame-pointer
    )

    target_link_options(test-txn PRIVATE
        -fsanitize=address,undefined
    )
endif()

if(WIN32)

    target_compile_options(test-txn PRIVATE
        /fsanitize=address
    )
endif()
